memories.value: First run. Discover all active experiments and their current metrics. Establish baseline analysis for each.
p-value threshold: 0.05. Minimum sample: 1000 per variant. Novelty check window: 7 days. Max duration: 28 days. Sequential testing correction: Bonferroni.
